scenes.name: app-launch
scenes.description: BlackTape launches and the main interface loads with the search bar and navigation visible

actions.description: Wait for the BlackTape main interface to fully load with the navigation sidebar and search bar visible
Let the interface fully settle after initial load

scenes.success_criteria: The BlackTape main interface is visible with navigation sidebar, search bar, and the main content area fully rendered

scenes.name: artist-search
scenes.description: Search for an artist by name and show the search results with country flags and tags

actions.description: Click the search input field in the header
Type an artist name into the search bar
Wait for search results to populate
Wait for search results to appear showing artist names with country flags and tags
Let the viewer absorb the search results

scenes.success_criteria: Search results are visible showing at least one artist with tags and country flag information

scenes.name: artist-page
scenes.description: Navigate to an artist page showing the header with uniqueness badge, tags, bio, and discography

actions.description: Click the first artist result in the search results to navigate to their artist page
Wait for the artist page to fully load with the artist header, tags, and discography visible
Let the artist page content settle

scenes.success_criteria: The artist page is visible with the artist name, uniqueness badge, clickable tags, and at least some discography entries with cover art

scenes.name: artist-page-scroll
scenes.description: Scroll down the artist page to reveal the discography section with release cover art and platform links

actions.description: Scroll down the main content area to reveal more of the discography and external links
Let the scrolled content settle
Scroll down a bit more to show the embedded player or external links section
Pause for the viewer to see the discography and links

scenes.success_criteria: The discography section is visible showing album cover art, release years, and platform listen links

scenes.name: tag-search
scenes.description: Switch to tag search mode and search for a genre tag to find artists by style

actions.description: Scroll back to the top of the page
Click the search input field in the header
Click the Tags toggle or switch to switch the search mode from artist search to tag search
Type a genre tag into the search bar
Wait for tag search results to appear
Wait for tag search results showing artists tagged with the searched genre
Let the viewer see tag search results

scenes.success_criteria: Tag search results are visible showing artists associated with the searched tag, with relevance ordering

scenes.name: discover-page
scenes.description: Navigate to the Discover page showing the tag cloud and top discovery-ranked artists

actions.description: Navigate to the Discover page using the sidebar navigation
Wait for the Discover page to load with the tag cloud and artist results
Let the Discover page content settle

scenes.success_criteria: The Discover page is visible with a tag cloud of clickable genre tags and a list of discovery-ranked artists below

scenes.name: discover-tag-filter
scenes.description: Click tags on the Discover page to filter artists by intersecting genres, demonstrating the tag intersection discovery

actions.description: Click a genre tag in the tag cloud, such as 'electronic' or 'ambient'
Wait for results to filter by the selected tag
Wait for the filtered artist results to appear
Click a second genre tag to narrow down further with AND logic, such as 'ambient' or 'experimental'
Wait for the doubly-filtered results to appear
Wait for the results showing artists matching both tags
Let the viewer absorb the tag intersection results

scenes.success_criteria: The Discover page shows filtered results with at least two active tags in the filter row and a list of matching artists below

scenes.name: style-map
scenes.description: Navigate to the Style Map showing the interactive genre graph visualization with nodes and edges

actions.description: Navigate to the Style Map page using the sidebar navigation
Wait for the Style Map graph visualization to load and settle with genre nodes and connecting edges visible
Let the D3 force simulation finish computing the layout

scenes.success_criteria: The Style Map visualization is visible showing genre nodes as circles of varying sizes connected by edges, with readable tag names

scenes.name: style-map-hover
scenes.description: Hover over nodes on the Style Map to highlight genres and show their names

actions.description: Hover over a large genre node near the center of the Style Map graph
Let the hover highlight effect appear
Move to hover over a different, smaller genre node nearby
Show the second genre highlight

scenes.success_criteria: A genre node is highlighted on hover with its tag name clearly visible

scenes.name: knowledge-base
scenes.description: Navigate to the Knowledge Base showing the genre encyclopedia with the genre graph

actions.description: Navigate to the Knowledge Base page using the sidebar navigation
Wait for the Knowledge Base page to load with the genre graph centered on the user's taste
Let the knowledge base graph settle

scenes.success_criteria: The Knowledge Base page is visible with a genre graph showing interconnected genres, scenes, and cities as distinct visual elements

scenes.name: genre-page
scenes.description: Click a genre in the Knowledge Base to open its encyclopedia page with description, key artists, and related genres

actions.description: Click a genre node in the Knowledge Base graph to navigate to its genre page
Wait for the genre page to load showing the genre description, key artists, and related genres
Let the genre page content settle
Scroll down slightly to reveal key artists and related genres sections
Pause to show the genre page content

scenes.success_criteria: A genre page is visible with a genre name, description text, and sections for key artists and related genres

scenes.name: time-machine
scenes.description: Navigate to the Time Machine and browse artists by decade and year

actions.description: Navigate to the Time Machine page using the sidebar navigation
Wait for the Time Machine page to load with decade buttons and artist results
Let the Time Machine page settle
Click a decade button, such as the 80s or 90s
Wait for results to filter by the selected decade
Wait for artist results from the selected decade to appear
Let the viewer see the time-filtered results

scenes.success_criteria: The Time Machine page is visible with decade navigation buttons, a year slider, and artist results from the selected time period

scenes.name: crate-digging
scenes.description: Navigate to Crate Digging mode and hit the Dig button to get random artist discoveries

actions.description: Navigate to the Crate Digging page using the sidebar navigation
Wait for the Crate Digging page to load with filter inputs and the Dig button
Let the page settle
Click the Dig button to get a random batch of artists
Wait for random artist results to appear
Wait for the random artist results to fully render
Let the viewer see the random results

scenes.success_criteria: The Crate Digging page shows a batch of randomly selected artists with their names and tags visible

scenes.name: library-page
scenes.description: Navigate to the Local Music Library showing scanned albums in a grid layout

actions.description: Navigate to the Library page using the sidebar navigation
Wait for the Library page to load showing the album grid or folder management interface
Let the library page content settle

scenes.success_criteria: The Library page is visible showing either an album grid with scanned music or the folder management interface for adding music folders

scenes.name: player-bar
scenes.description: Show the player bar at the bottom with retro FX effects -- VU meters, tape counter, scanlines, film grain, and blinking LED

actions.description: Click a track in the library or navigate to an artist and play something to activate the player bar
Wait for the player bar to appear at the bottom of the screen with transport controls and track info
Let the player bar fully render with all retro FX effects active -- VU meters animating, tape counter glowing, LED blinking

scenes.success_criteria: The player bar is visible at the bottom of the screen showing track info, transport controls, seek bar, and volume controls with retro cassette-era visual effects

scenes.name: player-controls
scenes.description: Interact with player transport controls -- demonstrate play, pause, and the queue panel

actions.description: Click the queue icon button on the right side of the player bar to open the queue sidebar
Wait for the queue sidebar to open and show upcoming tracks
Wait for the queue sidebar to be visible with the track list
Let the viewer see the queue panel

scenes.success_criteria: The queue sidebar is open and visible alongside the player bar, showing the list of tracks in the queue

scenes.name: settings-overview
scenes.description: Navigate to Settings showing layout templates, theme options, and AI features configuration

actions.description: Navigate to the Settings page using the sidebar navigation or header link
Wait for the Settings page to load showing the various configuration sections
Let the settings page content settle
Scroll down to show the layout templates, theme mode options, and AI features section
Let the viewer see the settings options

scenes.success_criteria: The Settings page is visible showing configuration sections including layout templates, theme options, or AI features

scenes.name: layout-switch
scenes.description: Demonstrate switching between workspace layouts -- from Cockpit to Focus or Minimal

actions.description: Click the layout switcher dropdown in the ControlBar at the top right of the workspace
Wait for the layout dropdown to open
Select a different layout template such as Focus or Minimal from the dropdown
Wait for the layout transition to complete with panels resizing
Wait for the new layout to settle with the correct panel configuration
Let the viewer see the new layout

scenes.success_criteria: The workspace layout has visibly changed -- panels have been added, removed, or resized to match a different layout template

scenes.name: final-overview
scenes.description: Return to the main Discover page for a final overview shot of the BlackTape interface

actions.description: Navigate back to the Discover page for the closing shot
Wait for the Discover page to fully load
Hold on the Discover page for a final beauty shot of the full interface

scenes.success_criteria: The Discover page is displayed in a clean, settled state showing the full BlackTape interface as a closing shot
